title: Silver Chorus
description: A simple resource pack that changes the interface to a dark one with pleasant purple shades.
body:
![The entire interface is designed in pleasant light lilac tones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eaa7766a6a7b1246e139860818fb9bfb7c45bb3.png)A simple resource pack that changes the interface to a dark one with pleasant purple shades.
In the future, it is planned to support mods.!

![The entire interface is designed in pleasant light lilac tones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb1637a9582822fbbe03af6c0e41507b2f95231.png)
